mitigations: kept layer final vector internal except the registered 64-bit top fixture output
compressed top-level status to top trace, layer trace, and decoder-block trace
kept nested attention, KV-cache, projection, residual, and MLP traces in simulation hierarchy
did not expose 128-bit memory response words, child package vectors, or debug arrays at the top boundary

timing_margin_note: Prior Layer FSM WHS was 0.021 ns and status was 64 bits; this Top FSM keeps status at 64 bits and avoids exposing child vectors/debug arrays to preserve routed hold margin.
verilator_status_policy: Verilator lint result recorded when verification.enable_verilator is true
vivado_timing_status_policy: post-route with non-NA setup/hold/pulse-width when synthesis is enabled
vivado_resource_status_policy: utilization.rpt emitted when Vivado synthesis completes
timing_caveat: Routed timing is fixture timing without board-level I/O delay, DDR/AXI shell, or PS/PL integration constraints; it is not board-level ZCU104 signoff.
timing_scope_caveat: post-route fixture timing only; no board-level I/O delay constraints, DDR/AXI shell constraints, or PS/PL integration constraints are applied; not board-level I/O, DDR/AXI, or PS/PL timing signoff
omitted_operations: true SiLU or exponential activation math in RTL
